verses.text: Amos, a herdman of Tekoa, declares, 'The LORD will roar from Zion'; even the pastures mourn. A shepherd's call. God uses a plain man to thunder against the nations.
Amos, a herdman of Tekoa, declares, 'The LORD will roar from Zion'; even the pastures mourn. A shepherd's call. God uses a plain man to thunder against the nations.
'For three transgressions of Damascus, and for four,' He will not turn away the punishment; they threshed Gilead with iron. Cruelty judged. God repays the savage violence of nations.
'For three transgressions of Damascus, and for four,' He will not turn away the punishment; they threshed Gilead with iron. Cruelty judged. God repays the savage violence of nations.
'For three transgressions of Damascus, and for four,' He will not turn away the punishment; they threshed Gilead with iron. Cruelty judged. God repays the savage violence of nations.
Against Gaza, who carried captives to sell to Edom; fire shall consume her, and the Philistines perish. Slave-trade answered. The trafficking of men draws God's fire.
Against Gaza, who carried captives to sell to Edom; fire shall consume her, and the Philistines perish. Slave-trade answered. The trafficking of men draws God's fire.
Against Gaza, who carried captives to sell to Edom; fire shall consume her, and the Philistines perish. Slave-trade answered. The trafficking of men draws God's fire.
Against Tyre, who delivered up captives and 'remembered not the brotherly covenant.' Broken faith. To betray a covenant of friendship is no light thing to God.
Against Tyre, who delivered up captives and 'remembered not the brotherly covenant.' Broken faith. To betray a covenant of friendship is no light thing to God.
Against Edom, who 'did pursue his brother with the sword,' casting off all pity. Brotherly hatred. Edom's unrelenting malice against Israel is judged.
Against Edom, who 'did pursue his brother with the sword,' casting off all pity. Brotherly hatred. Edom's unrelenting malice against Israel is judged.
Against Ammon, who ripped up the women of Gilead to enlarge their border; their king shall go captive. Greed and cruelty. Ambition that spills innocent blood meets God's sword.
